$source: AWS public on-demand pricing for ca-central-1 (current as of 2026-04-22). Spot rates are 60-70% of on-demand historically; forge-estimate uses 0.30 * on-demand as a conservative spot estimate. Verify against AWS Pricing API at runtime when feasible.
$comment: Prices in USD per hour. EBS rates per GB-month. Refresh this snapshot when AWS pricing shifts >5% on any line item.

ebs_gp3.$comment: Storage rate. forge-estimate amortizes per hour: rate_usd_hr_per_gb = 0.10 / (30*24).

s3.$comment: Cost Explorer is the ground truth post-hoc; forge-estimate uses these for projection.

data_transfer.$comment: Intra-region EC2<->S3 is free. Forge avoids cross-region by design (provision rejects cross-region specs).

cost_explorer.$comment: First request per day is free; we batch reconciliation calls to stay free.

$instance_notes.g5.2xlarge: Primary recommendation for 3B-7B class models in ca-central-1. A10G 24GB fits 7B QLoRA comfortably (~12 GB used) with room for seq_len=2048.
$instance_notes.g6.2xlarge: Cheaper alternative to g5.2xlarge in ca-central-1 (~$0.98 vs $1.46). L4 24GB — same memory, ~20-30% slower training throughput than A10G. Use when cost > speed.
$instance_notes.$quota_ceiling_ca-central-1: 8 vCPU G+VT default quota. g5.4xlarge (16 vCPU) + g5.12xlarge + g6e (L40S, not available in ca-central-1) all blocked without a quota increase request.
